name: Dharmaraj Thapa
profileSummary: Janakavi Keshari Dharmaraj Thapa was one of the most significant Nepali folk singers. He is most famous for his songs "Hariyo Danda Maathi ", "Nepali le Maya Maaryo Barilai ". Dharmaraj Thapa started singing hyms, folk songs including dancing acts from his early childhood. He was married to 13yrs old Shavitri at the age of 15 on 28th Baisakh, 1996 B.S. He is also honoured as lifetime member at the Nepal Academy.
